channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Declan Meredith eyes Wallabies debut after Carter Gordon injury
item.description: Declan Meredith, an unheralded Brumbies playmaker, is poised for a potential Wallabies debut after injury setbacks to Carter Gordon. The 28-year-old's form in Super Rugby, where he secured a starting ...

item.title: Swimmer Missing After Being Swept Away by River Current in B.C. Park
item.description: A female swimmer is still missing following an incident at Stamp River Provincial Park on Vancouver Island, British Columbia. The Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) received a call on July 5 at appr...

item.title: South Africa's Healthcare Sector Faces R30bn Fraud Losses
item.description: South Africa's healthcare sector is losing an estimated R30bn annually to fraud, waste, and abuse, according to findings presented at the 25th annual Board of Healthcare Funders (BHF) conference in Ca...

item.title: Burning Semitruck Causes 25-Acre Brush Fire and Major I-5 Traffic Delays Near Castaic
item.description: A semitruck caught fire Monday afternoon on northbound Interstate 5 near Castaic, California, igniting a nearby brush fire that led to significant highway disruptions during the evening rush hour. The...

item.title: Heavy Rain Disrupts Mumbai-Pune Connectivity, Landslides Trigger School Closures
item.description: A severe cloudburst and heavy rainfall have caused widespread disruptions in Maharashtra, particularly affecting the Mumbai-Pune corridor. The Mumbai-Pune Expressway's Missing Link section was closed ...

item.title: Queensland to open night sanctuary for 100 homeless individuals in South Brisbane
item.description: Queensland's first full-time night sanctuary for homeless people will open within two years, providing 110 beds for vulnerable individuals. Housing Minister Sam O’Connor announced a $7.3 million inves...

item.title: Community Support Helps Mother and Seven Children After Homeless Due to Fire
item.description: A devastating fire in Reservoir Hills left a mother and her seven children homeless, prompting an immediate community response. The family, consisting of three girls aged 17, 6, and 5, and four boys a...

item.title: Belgium defeat USA in World Cup clash as political controversy overshadows match
item.description: The United States men's football team suffered a 1-4 defeat to Belgium in a World Cup knockout match, marking their exit from the tournament. The game, held in Seattle, was overshadowed by political c...

item.title: MPs Detail Southern Road Development Plans to Boost Economy
item.description: Members of Parliament have defended the government's infrastructure investment strategy in the southern regions, addressing concerns about road development funding and implementation timelines. The pa...

item.title: Paraguay Government Condemns Racial Abuse by Lawmaker Against Mbappe
item.description: The Paraguayan government has strongly condemned a lawmaker for making racially abusive remarks against Kylian Mbappe, the French football star. The incident has sparked national debate on racism and ...

item.title: Vice President Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial Progresses on Day 2
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte continued on July 7, 2026, with live updates highlighting key developments in the proceedings. The trial, which began on Day 1, focuses on allegati...

item.title: Ronaldo reflects on World Cup exit and Euro 2016 legacy after Portugal's loss to Spain
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo, Portugal's star forward, shared his thoughts on the end of his World Cup journey after his team was eliminated by Spain in the Round of 16. The match, held in Arlington, Texas, ende...

item.title: Attack on Ziarat Police Checkpoint Leaves 9 Officers Killed, 5 Abducted
item.description: In a violent incident in Balochistan's Ziarat district, nine police personnel were killed and five others were abducted after armed assailants attacked a police checkpoint in the Mangi area. The attac...

item.title: FG and Marketers Discuss Petrol Pricing Reform Amid Refinery Collaboration
item.description: Independent petroleum marketers in Nigeria have urged the Federal Government to restore their right to import petroleum products, citing potential pump price reductions for Premium Motor Spirit (PMS) ...

item.title: Ram Mandir Trust Clarifies No Wrongdoing by Champat Rai, Ensures Donations Secure
item.description: The Ram Mandir donation controversy took a new turn as trustee Mahant Dinendra Das defended former general secretary Champat Rai, asserting no wrongdoing was found against him. The trust confirmed all...

item.title: Subaru Driver Collides with Boda Boda Rider in Kasarani
item.description: A viral video captured a drunk Subaru driver speeding away after hitting a boda boda rider and dragging their motorcycle in Kasarani. The incident, which occurred on July 6, shows the driver fleeing a...

item.title: Celebrity Impersonators Embark on a Cruise: A Unique Blend of Art and Performance
item.description: The article explores the experience of celebrity impersonators aboard a luxury cruise, where they blend performance art with leisure. It details the Sunburst Convention of Celebrity Impersonators, a g...

item.title: Former Apple Engineer Launches AI Chip Startup at 55
item.description: Stephen Huang, a veteran chip designer with experience at MediaTek, Apple, and Amazon's AI team, founded Tranxform AI in 2024 to develop power-efficient processors for running AI models outside data c...

item.title: Kevin McCarthy Faces Online Backlash After Comments on Allegations Against Graham Platner
item.description: Former House Speaker Kevin McCarthy faced widespread criticism on social media after commenting on sexual assault allegations involving Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner during a Fox Ne...

item.title: USA's World Cup 2026 exit marked by 4-1 loss to Belgium – in pictures
item.description: The United States men's football team suffered a significant setback in the World Cup 2026, losing 4-1 to Belgium in a high-stakes clash in Seattle. This defeat effectively ended their hopes of advanc...
